title: Pork and Caramelized Wrap
description: A delicious Portuguese-inspired wrap filled with pork and caramelized onions.
instructions: Season the pork shoulder with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork shoulder until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pork to a baking sheet and roast in the oven until cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
While the pork is cooking, caramelize the onion in the skillet by cooking it over low heat for about 20-25 minutes.
Warm the Portuguese roll in the oven for a few minutes.
Slice the cooked pork and assemble the wrap by placing it on the roll, followed by caramelized onion, cheese, and cilantro.
